message:
refactor(format): DRY with readNumericColumn helper

Add generic readNumericColumn() helper for Lance column reading:
- Consolidates readFloat64/Int64/Float32/Int32Column (4 funcs)
- Uses comptime switch for decoder method selection
- Each public function becomes a single-line wrapper

lazy_lance_file.zig: 549 → 407 lines (-142, 26%)
